title: いつか咲く、その日まで……

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking along the riverbank...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Phew! Okay, after this break, I'll do another run!
choice_data_list: What a hard worker you are.
What a hard worker you are.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello. You're one of the trainers from the
academy, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the compliment! However, I'm still
not where I want to be.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
There's someone I look up to, and I'll have to
work much harder if I ever hope to catch up to
her!
choice_data_list: And who's that, if I may ask?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Maruzen is—I mean, Maruzensky is my idol!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
She's so fast and elegant and cool! Not only that,
she's great at driving and delightfully kind.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
She's the flashiest gentlewoman ever! She's my
everything!
choice_data_list:
("Flashy gentlewoman"? I've never heard two
more incongruous terms...)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
What I mean to say is... Maruzen is just sooo
amazing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I hope I can be as incredible as her one day...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sigh. You're right...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: No matter how hard I try, I'll never be Maruzen.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
In every age are faint hopes doomed to be
trapped in the fickle and violent line between
dream and reality...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But at the very least, my dream of standing on
the same stage as her one day is still within my
grasp. At least, I believe it is.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll stay true to myself and continue working hard
without overdoing it. By doing so, I'm sure I, too,
will bloom someday.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thank you! I feel a lot more confident now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Okay, break time's over! It's time to get running
again!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I feel much more sure of myself
hearing that from you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But it will be a long and perilous road to get to
where Maruzen is. She's accomplished some truly
amazing things.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Still, I believe I'll be able to stand on the same
stage as her one day.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I may be but a small bud now, but if I work hard
each and every day...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My dream will come into a full and beautiful
bloom, just as the cherry blossoms do every
spring!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Okay, break time's over! It's time to get running
again!
